_ruleNotes.COR001: Inline objects OK — K8s composite props are simple and readable inline
_ruleNotes.COR004: Unused exports expected — resources are consumed by serializers, not same-file refs
_ruleNotes.COR009: File count limit too strict for multi-resource networking config
_ruleNotes.COR013: Mixed resource/config acceptable — networking configs are tightly coupled to their resources
_ruleNotes.EVL004: Spread from shared config is safe and traceable
_ruleNotes.WGC002: Hardcoded GCP regions intentional — fixed 3-region deployment
